subcodes.first_line: The fragrance of God hath turned unto thee through this Tablet, whereby every soul hath advanced, every seated one hath arisen, and every slumberer hath awakened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد توجه الیک عرف الله بهذا اللوح الذی به اقبل کل نفس و قام کل قاعد و انتبه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
